The command failed with exit code 2. Here's the summary:
## fast-ci Results: FAILED
**Exit Code:** 2 (Prettier formatting issues)
### Issues Found:
**Prettier Check - Code style issues found in 2 files:** 1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
